basic_details.short_information: Anand Agricultural University (AAU) has published the Vice-Chancellor Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill Vice-Chancellor position. Distinguished academicians with a minimum of ten years of experience as Professor and above in the university system or ten years of experience in an equivalent or higher position in a reputed research and/or academic administrative organization in the field of Agriculture or Allied Sciences are eligible to apply. The application process is being conducted in offline mode, and interested candidates can submit their applications on or before 15 Ju

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AAU Vice-Chancellor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.aau.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AAU Vice-Chancellor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AAU Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download AAU Vice-Chancellor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Vice-Chancellor: Minimum of ten years of experience as Professor and above in university system or ten years of experience in an equivalent or higher position in a reputed research and / or academic administrative organisation in the field of Agriculture or Allied Sciences.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AAU Vice-Chancellor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.aau.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Vice-Chancellor post at AAU?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications for the Vice-Chancellor post at Anand Agricultural University is 15th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Vice-Chancellor position?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification requires a distinguished academician with at least ten years of experience as a Professor or in an equivalent or higher position in a reputed research or academic administrative organization in Agriculture or Allied Sciences.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for the Vice-Chancellor post?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. You need to download the application proforma from the university website, fill it out, and submit it in hard copy to the Registrar, Anand Agricultural University, Anand.

faq.question: Q4. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The detailed application proforma can be downloaded from the official university website, which is www.aau.in.

faq.question: Q5. What is the address to send the application?
faq.answer: The duly filled application must be submitted in hard copy to "The Registrar, Anand Agricultural University, Anand 388110, Gujarat".

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Vice-Chancellor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Vice-Chancellor at Anand Agricultural University.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Vice-Chancellor position is Full Time.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of Anand Agricultural University?
faq.answer: The official website of Anand Agricultural University is www.aau.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the field of this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment falls under the education field, specifically for a leadership position in an agricultural university.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Vice-Chancellor post at AAU?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications for the Vice-Chancellor post at Anand Agricultural University is 15th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.
